---
title: "Binary Endpoints"
---

::: {.light-content}
```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: neutral
---
flowchart TB
  AB[Binary Endpoints] --> ABA(Two-Arms)
    ABA --> ABAA(Fixed Design)
      ABAA --> ABAAA([Exact Computation])
      ABAA --> ABAAB([Z-pooled])
      ABAA --> ABAAC([Z-unpooled])
    ABA --> ABAB(Group-Sequential Design)
      ABAB --> ABABA([Z-pooled])
  AB ---> ABB(One-Arm)
    ABB --> ABBA([Exact Computation])
    ABB --> ABBB([Non-exact Computation])
```
:::

::: {.dark-content}
```{mermaid}
---
config:
  theme: dark
---
flowchart TB
  AB[Binary Endpoints] --> ABA(Two-Arms)
    ABA --> ABAA(Fixed Design)
      ABAA --> ABAAA([Exact Computation])
      ABAA --> ABAAB([Z-pooled])
      ABAA --> ABAAC([Z-unpooled])
    ABA --> ABAB(Group-Sequential Design)
      ABAB --> ABABA([Z-pooled])
  AB ---> ABB(One-Arm)
    ABB --> ABBA([Exact Computation])
    ABB --> ABBB([Non-exact Computation])
```
:::
